tracks.rawText: 3:04Bajo La luna (1)UploadReggaeton and Latin Pop fusion, Features a syncopated dembow drum pattern with a crisp snare and deep kick, A rhythmic acoustic guitar provides percussive strumming and melodic accents, A deep, melodic synth bass follows the chord progression, Male vocals are processed with subtle pitch correction and light reverb, The arrangement includes atmospheric synth pads and occasional electronic percussion fills, Key of G minor, 92 BPM, 4/4 time signature2PublishRemix
tracks.title: Bajo La luna (1)

tracks.rawText: 4:23Studio Selectionv5.5Huapango poderoso y marcado con arpa huasteca, violín lead y jarana golpeada, plus guitarrón marcando el pulso en compás de 6/8, Folk Andino Mexa color with quena, charango, zampoña, bombo legüero, tight unison riffs, rasped string accents, and dry room ambience for a forceful, earthy, stomping groove1PublishRemix
